videos.title: Kurapika's Ancient Nen Reveal Breaks The Succession War!
videos.description:
Hunter x Hunter has finally returned! Kurapika reveals The Kakin Empire's ancient nen ritual, limitations, and vows. The Succession War and 14th Prince Woble's secrets are explained.
4th Prince Tserriednich also does the unspeakable!

🔔 Subscribe for more One Piece chapters!
➤ https://youtube.com/channel/UCb9CyYGTSHwh9pASlZtMI3A?sub_confirmation=1
